# Coverage Matrix (clean fixture)

Self-contained coverage-matrix snippet for the clean control fixture. The
module path is relative to the fixture's own directory (passed as `repo_root`),
so `module.py` resolves to `tests/fixtures/semantic_drift/clean/module.py`.

## Coverage Matrix

| Module | Capability | Notes |
|--------|------------|-------|
| module.py | clean | Control: spec SHALL matches the module exactly (returns a dict) |

End of matrix table (blank line above terminates the parsed body).
